name: @daanvandenbergh/claudekit
description: Not a wrapper around the Claude/Anthropic API - a content-only set of reusable Claude Code skills (TypeScript audits, legal policy writing, SEO, agent memory) and CLAUDE.md rule snippets, linked into a project's .claude/skills.
author: Daan van den Bergh

scripts.push-and-publish: git add -A && git commit -m 'Updates' && npm version patch && npm publish && git push -u origin main
